metadata.description: Plugin distribution for the Multi-Agent Coordination Framework (MACF). Provides the macf-agent plugin with channel server, coordination skills, agent identity templates, and startup hooks.

plugins.name: macf-agent
plugins.description: Runtime component of MACF: MCP channel server with mTLS, four coordination skills (macf-status, macf-peers, macf-ping, macf-issues), seven agent identity templates, SessionStart hooks (auto-pickup), and Stop hook (notify_peer per DR-023 UC-1; v0.2.3 ships with @groundnuty/macf-channel-server v0.2.3 — peer_notification NotifyType + self-exclusion normalization fixes).
